hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects multiple compliance providers into a single operational layer for VASPs to reduce manual overhead while maintaining audit-ready workflows and evidentiary traceability.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Relying heavily on a single provider limits operational flexibility and exposes teams to disruption if that provider changes or fails. This dependency creates gaps in audit trails, slows case reviews, and complicates vendor management across onboarding, risk, and Travel Rule workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates multiple compliance providers’ data and review actions into one cohesive operational workflow that reduces vendor dependency while preserving audit trails and accelerating case management.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented provider checks into structured workflows that enable compliance teams to review cases, log decisions, preserve evidence and prepare reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into one provider-neutral compliance layer that supports cases, decisions, audit evidence and operational control without vendor lock-in.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with multi-provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and deployment controls to reduce vendor dependency and strengthen operational resilience.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY reduce vendor lock-in risk for VASP compliance
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY connects multiple providers into one workflow
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved across fragmented provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports risk control in multi-provider environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce vendor lock-in risk?
faq_1_answer: SFTY reduces vendor lock-in by sitting above all providers, enabling multi-vendor orchestration and creating connected workflows independent of any single vendor’s technology or ecosystem.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one structured compliance workflow with connected cases, decisions, evidence and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit logs, decision records and case histories to support operational transparency and readiness for audits or regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports controlled integration with multiple compliance tools, allowing seamless connection across existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without disrupting current operations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows, enhancing visibility and control without vendor dependency.
final_title: Connect fragmented providers into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY turns multiple compliance outputs into structured cases, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
